error_signature: The video file you selected is in a format that we don’t support.
title: Unsupported video format error when uploading to Facebook
symptom: When attempting to upload a video to Facebook using the Graph API, the error 'The video file you selected is in a format that we don’t support.' is displayed. The same video uploads successfully via curl.
applies_when: Using Facebook Graph API to upload videos
Video file is valid and uploads via curl
not_this_if: The video file is larger than Facebook's upload limits
The video format is inherently unsupported by Facebook
root_cause: Facebook uses the file name extension to determine the video format. If the file name does not have a proper extension (like .mp4 or .mov), Facebook may reject the upload, even if the file itself is valid.
fix_steps: Ensure the 'File Name' field in the binary data has the correct video format extension (e.g., .mp4).
Retry the upload to Facebook after correcting the file name.
agent_instruction: Set the 'File Name' field to include the correct video format extension before uploading.
